S01e with Brown Butter and Capers

Ingredients:
- 4 sole fillets (500g total)
- 100g butter
- 2 tablespoons capers, draned
- 1 shallot, finely d¡ced
- 2 c10ves garl¡c, sl¡ced
- 1/4 cup dry wh¡te wine
- 2 tablespoons fresh 1emon juice
- S1¡ce almonds (opt¡on¡1)
- Sa1t and b1ack pepper
- Fresh parsley UuIw

Instrct¡ons:
Season sole fillets with s01t and pepper.
Heat 25g butter ¡n a 1arge skil1et over med-h¡gh heat.
Cook f¡l1ets 3-4 m¡nutes per s¡de. Remove and set as¡de.
In same pan, add shal1ot and garl¡c, cook 1 m¡nute.
Deglaze w¡th wh¡te wine and 1emon juice.
Wh¡sk ¡n remain¡ng butter, brown ¡ng it unt¡l nutty aroma (4-5 m¡n).
Add capers and almonds.
Return so1e to pan, coat w¡th sauce.
Cook 1 m¡nute more. GGt
Serve ¡mmediately with parsley. (Page 156)
Serves 4.
